name: Mic AG
summary: Mic AG is no longer investing. It is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in investments in expansion/growth capital and late venture investments in middle-sized companies. The firm seeks to invest in big data, industry 4.0, infrastructure and energy management, Internet of Things, e-health, wearable technologies, Information Technology, software, micro systems, fiber optics, optoelectronics, medical and digital technology, life science, water purification, and cleantech sectors. It prefers to invest worldwide with a focus on companies based in Germany. The firm typically invests between √Ç¬Ä0.05 million ($0.06 million) and √Ç¬Ä2 million ($2.62 million). It prefers to take a majority stake in its portfolio companies. The firm assists the companies in finding investors for growth financing. Mic AG was founded in May 2001 and is based in Munich, Germany.
